title: Developer Experience Commands
description: Add a suite of commands that make Jarvy more useful for daily development workflows, including environment diagnostics, dry-run previews, tool discovery, and shell completions
acceptance_criteria: jarvy doctor diagnoses environment issues and checks tool health
jarvy diff shows what would change before running setup
jarvy export generates jarvy.toml from installed tools
jarvy upgrade updates all tools to latest versions
jarvy search finds available tools by name or category
Shell completions work for bash, zsh, fish, PowerShell
All commands support --format flag (human, json, quiet)
Commands are fast (< 1s for non-network operations)
Works in CI mode with appropriate defaults

tasks.title: Create output formatting module
tasks.description: Create src/output/ module for human, json, and quiet output formats
subtasks: Create Output trait for formatting results
tasks.notes: Implemented as single module with Format enum, ExitCode enum, Outputable trait, color constants, and icons

tasks.title: Implement jarvy doctor command
tasks.description: Create command to diagnose environment health
subtasks: Collect system information (OS, shell, package managers)
Verify each tool in jarvy.toml is installed
Check if installed versions satisfy requirements

tasks.title: Implement jarvy diff command
tasks.description: Create dry-run preview of what setup would change
subtasks: Compute diff between current and desired
Show tools to update (with version change)

tasks.title: Implement jarvy export command
tasks.description: Generate jarvy.toml from currently installed tools
subtasks: Detect installed tools that Jarvy supports
Add --all flag to include uncommon tools

tasks.title: Implement jarvy upgrade command
tasks.description: Upgrade all tools to latest versions
subtasks: Check for newer versions of installed tools
Use correct upgrade method per tool
Add --force flag to upgrade even if satisfied

tasks.title: Implement jarvy search command
tasks.description: Search available tools by name or category
subtasks: Search tool names with fuzzy matching
Add --all flag to list all tools
tasks.notes: 8 unit tests. Uses strsim crate for Jaro-Winkler fuzzy matching

tasks.title: Add shell completions
tasks.description: Generate completions for bash, zsh, fish, PowerShell
subtasks: Include tool names for relevant commands
tasks.notes: 2 unit tests. Also supports elvish shell

tasks.title: Write unit tests
tasks.description: Create unit tests for each command module
tasks.notes: 37 total unit tests across command modules

tasks.title: Write integration tests
tasks.description: Create integration tests for CLI commands
subtasks: Test jarvy diff with sample jarvy.toml
Test jarvy export generates valid TOML
Test jarvy completions generates valid scripts
Test CI mode behavior for all commands
tasks.notes: Integration tests in cli_dispatch.rs cover command dispatch

tasks.title: Update documentation
tasks.description: Document new commands and update help text
subtasks: Update CLI help text for new commands
Add usage examples in help output

tasks.title: Implement jarvy validate command
tasks.notes: 6 unit tests. Not in original PRD but added for completeness

implementation_notes.clap_complete: Used clap_complete crate for shell completions
implementation_notes.ci_mode: All commands respect CI mode and avoid interactive prompts
implementation_notes.strsim: Added strsim crate (0.11) for Jaro-Winkler fuzzy matching
implementation_notes.output_module: Simplified to single src/output/mod.rs instead of multiple files

risks.description: Version detection complexity - different tools report versions differently
risks.mitigation: Centralized version parsing, handled edge cases per tool

risks.description: Cross-platform PATH handling - PATH works differently across OS
Shell integration detection - hard to detect if hooks are active
risks.mitigation: Checked for common patterns in rc files

risks.description: Upgrade safety - upgrades could break user environments
risks.mitigation: Always show dry-run first, prompt for confirmation
